caption: A panel of three people sits on high wooden chairs on a reflective black stage in a brightly lit studio. The person on the left wears a white shirt and dark pants, the middle person wears a dark dress, and the person on the right wears a grey suit. They are positioned in front of a large, dark curved screen and a backdrop of purple and blue laser-like lights. To their left is a small white podium, and to their right is a larger white structure. The text "SLUSH" and "HULS" are visible in reverse on the background. Throughout the sequence, the panel members remain seated and engaged in conversation, with slight shifts in their posture and gestures as they interact. The lighting and camera angle remain consistent, maintaining a wide shot of the stage and the participants.
